news.title: compiled every crypto trading stat from 2025-2026 I could verify against a named source, some surprised me
news.summary:
almost every "crypto stats" post floating around still cites 2022-2023 numbers. pulled together what I could actually verify against a named source, all from 2025 or 2026

$19B liquidated in 24 hours on Oct 10 2025. largest single-day liquidation in crypto history, roughly 9x any previous day. 1.62 million accounts wiped (CoinDesk Research)

derivatives are 82% of all crypto volume now. ~$209B derivatives vs ~$22B spot daily average. most p

news.title: How to pick between swap aggregators when the rates look almost identical
news.summary: Ran the same BTC to XMR swap through a few different sites last week and the quotes landed within a few bucks of each other. The whole "best rate" thing felt pointless, so stopped looking at the headline number. The rate you see at quote time changes on a floating quote. Many instant swaps use floating rates where the final rate shifts during confirmation or a volatile block window. On a two minute swap that barely matters. On something bigger, or when
